Class ExplorationModeModel

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.exploration.ExplorationModeModel
public class ExplorationModeModel extends Object
The central place to store global information for Proof Exploration.

This class holds the data and the state of proof exploration.

For every KeYMediator or MainWindow should only exists one instance.

See Also:
  • ExplorationExtension

    ExplorationModeModel.ExplorationState
    State whether whole application (with shown second branch) or simplified with hidden branch app should be used
